comment:
Build command envelopes for the JavaScript companion bridge.

Most higher-level companion modules use this module internally, but it is handy
when you need to talk to a custom bridge API.

    import Json.Encode as Encode
    import Pebble.Companion.Command as Command

    vibrateCommand =
        Command.command "cmd-1" "watch" "vibrate"
            |> Command.withPayload (Encode.object [])

# Command envelopes
@docs command, withPayload
name: Pebble.Companion.Command

values.comment: Build a command envelope with an empty payload.
values.name: command

values.comment: Replace payload on an existing command envelope.
values.name: withPayload

aliases.comment: Structured command envelope sent from Elm to the JS companion bridge.
aliases.name: CommandEnvelope
aliases.type:
{ id : String
, api : String
, op : String
, payload : Encode.Value
}

aliases.comment: Structured result envelope sent from JS companion bridge back to Elm.
aliases.name: ResultEnvelope
aliases.type:
{ id : String
, ok : Bool
, payload : Maybe Decode.Value
, error : Maybe BridgeError
}

aliases.comment: Structured bridge errors instead of plain string errors.
aliases.name: BridgeError
aliases.type:
{ type_ : String
, message : String
, retryable : Maybe Bool
}

aliases.comment: Pushed event envelope from JS companion bridge to Elm.
aliases.name: BridgeEvent

comment:
Shared data contracts for the Pebble companion bridge.

These records describe the JSON envelopes exchanged between Elm and the
JavaScript bridge.

# Envelopes
@docs CommandEnvelope, ResultEnvelope, BridgeError, BridgeEvent

comment:
Observe phone companion lifecycle events.

Subscribe once during companion startup and route pushed bridge events through
`decode`.

# Events

# Commands

comment:
Generic persistent user preferences exposed by the companion bridge.

App-specific generated configuration remains in `GeneratedPreferences`; this
module is for bridge-managed phone-side preference values.

# Events
@docs Event, decode

# Commands
@docs get, set, subscribe
name: Pebble.Companion.Preferences

unions.comment: Preference events emitted by the companion bridge.
unions.name: Event

values.comment: Decode a pushed preference bridge event.
values.name: decode

values.comment: Request a preference value by key.
values.name: get

values.comment: Save a preference value by key.
values.name: set

values.comment: Subscribe to preference changes when supported.
values.name: subscribe

values.comment: Remove a value by key.

values.name: clear

values.comment: Decode the result of a `get` command.
values.name: decodeGet
